seoTitle: Lake Tyrrell vs Lake Wendouree — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lake Tyrrell and Lake Wendouree. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lake Tyrrell vs Lake Wendouree: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lake Tyrrell and Lake Wendouree.
heading: Lake Tyrrell vs Lake Wendouree — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lake Tyrrell, Victoria and Lake Wendouree, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lake Tyrrell has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Lake Wendouree (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lake Tyrrell or Lake Wendouree safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lake Tyrrell has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Lake Wendouree scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lake Tyrrell scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Lake Wendouree scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lake Tyrrell or Lake Wendouree?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lake Tyrrell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
